name: VERA submission claim ledger
scope: Claims permitted in the current AAAI/ICLR-facing VERA paper and supplement. Automated checks verify traceability, not novelty, proof correctness, venue acceptance, or fair eligibility.

allowed_claims.claim: VERA applies Learn Then Test style finite-family risk control to preregistered representation edits and does not claim finite-candidate testing or abstention as novel.
The manuscript states a simultaneous support-aware shift-envelope theorem for paired target harm and class-balanced leakage under declared support and conditional density-ratio bounds.

The manuscript states and proves a two-world impossibility boundary for an unsupported required deployment cell, and identifies the registered Camelyon17 support failure as an empirical instance of forced abstention.

Automated numerical checks agree with the implemented closed forms and shift-envelope optimization to floating-point tolerance; these checks do not constitute human verification of the proofs or novelty.
The locked confirmatory matrix contains 200 official-code receipts covering five datasets, five pinned erasers, and eight untouched seeds, with no proxy rows in claim-grade results.
The independent raw audit verifies 480 NPZ checksums and recomputes 25,920 candidate rows and 10,800 deployment-rule decisions without a semantic or selection mismatch.

In the registered 32-configuration stress family, point selection violated 7 contracts and VERA-IUT violated none; this descriptive effect did not survive the preregistered seed-blocked Holm-corrected comparison.
The preregistered primary paired-significance pass condition failed, so the paper may not claim confirmatory empirical superiority over point selection.

Independent replays pass the registered 54-cell, 108,000-replicate simulation and the 216-cell, 432,000-replicate candidate/group-count extension, with false acceptances evaluated against each registered familywise bound.

All 144 registered Camelyon17 VERA configurations abstain because the deployment hospital lacks certification support; balanced external leakage is not estimable for its registered one-class source slice.

The current AAAI build uses seven content pages plus references, has a vector three-panel Figure 1, verified references, an explicit AI-assistance disclosure, and clean anonymous metadata under the automated presentation audit.
A separately hashed 32-seed stress replication is registered and running; no result from it may be claimed until all receipts and the independent audit are complete.

forbidden_claims.claim: VERA invented finite-family risk control, candidate certification, or abstention.
The theorem or its novelty has been formally or externally verified.
forbidden_exact_patterns: the VERA theorem is formally verified
the theorem has been externally verified

forbidden_claims.claim: VERA controls external risk without support and density-ratio assumptions.
forbidden_exact_patterns: VERA guarantees safety under arbitrary distribution shift

forbidden_claims.claim: The locked study establishes statistically significant empirical superiority over point selection.
forbidden_exact_patterns: VERA wins on all five datasets

forbidden_claims.claim: VERA removes a concept universally or protects against unregistered attackers.
forbidden_exact_patterns: VERA is safe against every attacker
VERA guarantees fairness for unmeasured concepts

forbidden_claims.claim: Camelyon17 results establish clinical safety or deployment readiness.
forbidden_exact_patterns: VERA is ready for clinical deployment

forbidden_claims.claim: The independent stress replication is complete before all registered receipts and audits exist.
forbidden_exact_patterns: the independent stress replication is complete

forbidden_claims.claim: Human external review, venue acceptance, or ISEF eligibility is complete or guaranteed.
forbidden_exact_patterns: two external ML reviews are complete
VERA will be accepted to AAAI
VERA will be accepted to ICLR

external_blockers: Two genuine cold reviews from researchers who publish in machine learning remain incomplete.
Formal proof and novelty assessment remain human scientific gates; numerical consistency checks do not close them.
The independent 32-seed stress replication is still running and cannot support a claim until its registered audit passes.
ISEF eligibility, student independence, authorship, AI-assistance disclosure, and venue submission confirmations require the student, sponsor, SRC, or venue systems.
